Why QR codes fail

The problem is the friction.

Old way — QR code on receipt
01
Open camera app Customer gets home, remembers, opens their camera
02
Scan the code If the receipt isn't crumpled, if the lighting is right
03
Wait for page load Google Maps loads. Sign in prompt appears.
04
Find the review form Navigate menus. Most people close the tab.
📱

The PROOF way

Customer sees your live rating glowing on the counter. They tap the base with their phone. Review form opens instantly. Done in 8 seconds.

NFC · ONE TAP · 8 SECONDS
Pilot Data · Portland 2026
7×
NFC taps convert to completed reviews at seven times the rate of QR codes.
The difference is timing. NFC happens at the moment of satisfaction — on the counter, before they leave. QR happens later, at home, after the moment is gone.
Methodology · n=10 Portland merchants · 60-day period · NFC: 61 taps, 43 reviews completed (70.5%) · QR: 187 receipts, 27 reviews completed (14.4%)

Quick answers

Everything you need to know.

PROOF Display is a $499 countertop hardware device for cafés, salons, and boutiques. It shows your live Google rating, Instagram follower count, POS orders, and daily promotions on a 10.1-inch screen. Customers tap the NFC base with their phone — the Google review form opens in under 8 seconds. The Social Proof tier (Google rating + Instagram) is free forever after the one-time hardware purchase.

PROOF displays your live Google rating on a glowing 10-inch screen at your counter. When a satisfied customer sees it, they tap the NFC base with their phone — the Google review form opens instantly. No searching, no QR scanning, no typing a URL. The review happens in the moment of satisfaction, not an hour later at home. Portland pilot merchants averaged 2.3× more reviews per month after installing PROOF.

Yes. NFC taps convert to completed reviews at approximately 7× the rate of QR codes. The difference is timing and friction. QR codes require the customer to open their camera, scan, wait for the page to load, navigate to the review form, and remember to do all of this — usually at home, after the moment of satisfaction has passed. NFC happens in the moment: one tap, form opens, review written. (Methodology: NFC group — 61 taps, 43 reviews completed over 60 days; QR receipt comparison — same 10 merchants, same period, 187 receipts distributed, 27 reviews completed.)

Businesses with 50+ Google reviews and a rating above 4.3★ appear in the Google 3-pack for 73% more local search queries than businesses below that threshold. A 0.1-star increase in rating drives up to 25% more conversions. 74% of consumers only trust reviews written in the last 3 months — which means review velocity, not just total count, determines your local ranking over time.

No. PROOF Display is fully compliant with Google's review policies. The NFC tap opens the native Google review form directly — there is no incentivization, no filtering of reviews by sentiment, and no redirection away from Google. PROOF simply removes the friction from a voluntary action the customer was already willing to take.

Under 10 minutes. Plug in, connect to WiFi, enter your Google Business Profile URL, and PROOF starts pulling your live rating immediately. NFC is pre-configured. POS integration (Business Proof) adds another 5 minutes for Square or Shopify authorization.

If PROOF Display does not generate a measurable increase in your Google review velocity within 30 days of installation, return it for a full refund — no restocking fee, free return shipping. The guarantee covers the $499 hardware purchase. Software subscriptions (Business Proof at $25/month) are billed monthly and can be cancelled anytime with no penalty.

That's exactly when PROOF helps most. Establish Mode shows your review trajectory — reviews added, rating climbing — rather than just a static number. A 3.8 becomes your starting line, not your ceiling. New reviews from genuinely happy customers push your rating up naturally. Portland merchants averaged a 0.4-star rating increase (4.3 to 4.7) within 60 days. Establish Mode is included in the free Social Proof tier at no extra cost.

PROOF Business Proof tier ($25/month) integrates with Square and Shopify. Once connected, Screen 3 shows your real-time total orders and best-selling item, and Screen 4 lets you push daily promotions from your merchant dashboard. Authorization takes under 5 minutes — you connect your Square or Shopify account via OAuth in the PROOF merchant dashboard. No API keys, no developer required.

The founding merchant program is a limited pilot for 10 locations in Portland, Oregon. Founding merchants receive priority onboarding, direct access to the PROOF team, and their feedback shapes the product before wider release. The hardware price is $499 with free shipping. The Social Proof tier is free forever. Business Proof is $25 per month — month-to-month, no annual contract required. Founding merchant pricing is locked for 12 months.
